rationale: Quality cycle: bug hunt on cycle 5 files found HIGH bug (BroceliandeForest3D uses dead /root/GameManager instead of _find_store() — HUD and encounter damage never applied). Feature: enhanced retro_screen.gdshader with PS1/CRT post-processing (chromatic aberration, phosphor bleed, Bayer 4x4 dithering, warm palette shift, interlace flicker). ps1_material.gdshader cleaned with proper nearest-neighbor filtering.
next_cycle_plan: Feature: apply PS1 retro post-processing to 2D scenes (HubAntre, Card overlay). Or implement answered feedback items (IntroQuiz/Rencontre deletion, game_flow_controller migration).
